description.to:
## Summary
Add default-on balanced curation to `plexus score dataset-curate`.

## Purpose
Reduce class-skew in associated datasets while preserving practical dataset size.

## Acceptance Criteria
- `--max-items` is the final output cap.
- Balancing is enabled by default.
- `--no-balance` explicitly disables balancing.
- Selection/output are deterministic.
- Command output includes before/after class distribution summary fields.
